title: dermatophyllum arizonicum
intro: Dermatophyllum arizonicum, also known as the Arizona palo verde, is a small shrub-like tree that belongs to the Fabaceae family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Dermatophyllum arizonicum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
